title: Full benchmark workflow: system setup, thinking, tool call, tool response, final answer

messages.content: You are a helpful research assistant. Use the search tool to look up current data before answering factual questions.
What is the population of Tokyo?

content.text: The user is asking about Tokyo's population. I should use the search tool to get the most current figure rather than relying on training data.
Let me look that up for you.

messages.content: {"results": [{"title": "Tokyo Population 2024", "snippet": "Tokyo's population is approximately 13.96 million in the city proper and about 37.4 million in the greater metropolitan area."}]}
messages.name: web_search

messages.content: Tokyo has a population of approximately 13.96 million in the city proper. The greater Tokyo metropolitan area — one of the largest urban agglomerations in the world — is home to around 37.4 million people.
